html:
2026-0593
2026-06-11FIN, GACCustoms TariffOrder Amending the Order Imposing a Surtax on the Importation of Certain Steel GoodsOrder Amending the Order Imposing a Surtax on the Importation of Certain Steel Goods in order to (1) extend to June 27, 2027 the tariff rate quotas (TRQ) levels for steel imports from non-free trade agreement partners at 20 percent of 2024 import volumes, and 50 percent for exceeding quota limits, and TRQ levels for steel imports from non-Canada-US-Mexico Agreement (CUSMA) partners at 75 percent of 2024 volumes, and exempted for exceeding quota limits; and (2) make technical and consequential amendments to reclassify four tariff lines from hot-rolled sheet to cold-rolled products to better reflect their product characteristics.Registration: SOR/2026-0119 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Order Amending the Order Imposing a Surtax on the Importation of Certain Steel Goods
precis: Order Amending the Order Imposing a Surtax on the Importation of Certain Steel Goods in order to (1) extend to June 27, 2027 the tariff rate quotas (TRQ) levels for steel imports from non-free trade agreement partners at 20 percent of 2024 import volumes, and 50 percent for exceeding quota limits, and TRQ levels for steel imports from non-Canada-US-Mexico Agreement (CUSMA) partners at 75 percent of 2024 volumes, and exempted for exceeding quota limits; and (2) make technical and consequential amendments to reclassify four tariff lines from hot-rolled sheet to cold-rolled products to better reflect their product characteristics.
